name: LightningFaucet
description: Bitcoin and Lightning faucet with earning, games, and pay-per-use L402 API endpoints.

agent_endpoints.auth_note: Unauthenticated requests return an L402 challenge with a Lightning invoice. Pay the invoice, then retry with the L402 token and preimage.

source_attribution: Verified by LightningFaucet contributor via HEAD and GET on https://lightningfaucet.com/api/l402/headers.
